summary: Fixed remaining @jackoatmon scoped imports in crash-guard, integration-layer, and learning-engine
details: Replaced 3 remaining @jackoatmon/opencode-* references with unscoped opencode-* imports. crash-guard had a JSDoc comment reference, integration-layer and learning-engine had runtime require() calls with fallback chains.
